added.title: The Exiles
added.description: Fleeing the evil Chancellor Nuro, Iyanu meets the Corrupt Divine Beast Ekun and a mysterious boy named Biyi. As she uncovers her extraordinary powers, she also explores hidden treasures beyond the Walls of Elu.

added.title: The Betrayal
added.description: Elu descends into civil war as Biyi, Oba Adeyinka and Kanfo tell personal stories of past heartbreak. Iyanu, Toye, Ekun and Biyi struggle to reach The Source, while Olori continues her search for Iyanu.

added.title: Breaking Up Is Hard To Do
added.description: Caleb is desperate to put his relationship with Priya back together while the campers tear apart the largest objects they can find.

added.title: Circling The Drain
added.description: Julia gets between Caleb and Priya during the most painful memory game of all time.

added.title: Working K9 to 5
added.description: Release the hounds! Campers are hunted by a pack of fearsome attack dogs. And one pug.

added.title: Off The Hook
added.description: Things get scary when campers are pulled into a fishhook challenge that pits them against each other AND their worst fears.

added.title: Soar Losers
added.description: Only 3 campers remain and if any of them live through the final challenge they might win the 1 million dollars Chris promised them. But on Total Drama Island promises are a lot like bones; they're often broken.

added.title: Meet the Victims
added.description: Chris welcomes 16 new campers back to the original island and divides them into two teams who face-off in a blindfolded challenge that's sure to cause pain.

added.title: Pirates of the Cabbagean
added.description: Our two teams go to war, firing cabbages from cannons at each other from their respective pirate ships. The first team to sink the other will be the winner, but someone takes a very personal interest in one specific target.

added.title: Drown Town Abbey
added.description: Each team has a member placed into a clear glass tank that is locked and slowly filling with water. In order to free them, they must retrieve the codes at the far end of a very dangerous obstacle course.

added.title: Numbskull Island
added.description: It's just a normal game of capture the flag… except the flag is a skull, and your opponents are armed with fire hoses, toilet plunger harpoons and giant rolling boulders… which is nothing like capture the flag.

added.title: Jurassic Fart
added.description: After an all-bean breakfast the teams must cross the island in silence to avoid being eaten by raptors. That's right, this episode has dinosaurs... and lots of farting. The first team to reach the other side claims victory.

added.title: Charlie Ball
added.description: After Panda gets injured on the basketball court, the Bears invite Charlie to be on their basketball team. But when Charlie gets too good, he starts to ruin all the fun of the game.

added.title: Yard Sale
added.description: Each of the Bears get offbeat items at a local yard sale. Their new possessions send them on their own separate adventures.

added.title: Slumber Party
added.description: A thunderstorm forces Chloe to spend the night at the Cave with the Bears. When Chloe's parents tell the Bears to protect Chloe, they take the task a bit too seriously.

added.title: Bear Cleanse
added.description: A doctor tells the Bears to go on a cleanse to improve their health. But when Grizz realizes he can only eat what grizzly bears eat, he starts to lose his mind.

added.title: Charlie and the Snake
added.description: Charlie is a solo guy who, like the Bears, would love to find a place for himself in the world. In an effort to do so, Charlie throws a party, but ends up going on an adventure with the unlikeliest of animals, a wild snake.

added.title: Video Date
added.description: Panda is an avid e-dater, and when a lovely French woman matches with him and agrees to a video chat date. Panda and his brothers engineer the situation so Panda is able to show the best side of himself on the video chat, even if that side of him is completely exaggerated.

added.title: Pet Shop
added.description: Pet Shop tells the tale of where the Baby Bears once lived, and after a run-in with a video crew shooting a Sarah McLachlan-type animal adoption video, almost seized an opportunity to find a home separated from each other.

added.title: Chloe and Ice Bear
added.description: On a day out with just Ice Bear, Chloe realizes Ice Bear only runs errands for his brothers. Determined to show him a fun day in the city, Chloe promises to help Ice Bear have a good time, even if it means staying  in a museum after it closes.

added.title: Cupcake Job
added.description: When the Bears' beloved laptop breaks, they finally have the need to do something they've never done before: get jobs. Working at a trendy cupcake shop, the Bears find  that the working world is much tougher than they realized.

added.title: Hibernation
added.description: The bears, being an urban bunch, hadn't ever heard of the idea of hibernation until Chloe tells them about it. Grizz, loving the idea of eating a ton and then just sleeping to his heart's content, goes for it with reckless abandon.  But Grizz is so excited for hibernating... that he can't fall asleep.

added.title: Spirit Balls
added.description: Susie and Ramona teach the witches how to make spirit balls.

added.title: Oscar & His Demon
added.description: Oscar works to overcome his fear of crossing a very scary bridge.

added.title: The Emily Ghost Institute for Manners and Magical Etiquette
added.description: Oscar and Hedgehog go to a magical etiquette class.

added.title: Jeremiah
added.description: Oscar finds and cares for a magical root from Susie's yard.

added.title: Tomorrow's Bananas
added.description: Oscar and Hedgehog get an unsettling glimpse into the future.
